title: Bacterial Thymidylate Synthase with Intein, Group II Intron, and Distinctive ThyX Motifs
abstract: The ThyX class of thymidylate synthases was previously characterized by a common ThyX motif, RHRX 7 S. We report bacterial ThyX sequences having distinctive ThyX motifs, suggesting a more general ThyX motif, R/THRX 7-8 S. One ThyX sequence has an intein in its ThyX motif that was shown to do protein splicing and a group II intron in its gene, suggesting a hot spot for these self-splicing mobile elements.
